name: accounting firms processing 10–20 expense reports/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes compliance issues. We convert raw expense reports into compliant accounting entries instead of manual entry of expense reports into accounting software.
problem_solved: inaccurate accounting entries due to manual processing of raw expense reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: inaccurate accounting entries due to manual processing of raw expense reports
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes compliance issues. We convert raw expense reports into compliant accounting entries instead of manual entry of expense reports into accounting software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual entry of expense reports into accounting software
